items.title: TSMC’s US$2t Milestone And Apple Deal Reshape Chip Investment Case
items.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (NYSE:TSM) has reached a market capitalization of about US$2t, placing it among the most highly valued companies globally. The company is deepening its role as a key supplier to major technology firms, including a significant order from Apple for advanced chips. Apple's order is tied to chips planned for production at TSMC's Arizona facility in the U.S., highlighting an increased focus on domestically produced semiconductors. Taiwan Semiconductor...
